content.rendered:
𝐄𝐈𝐃 𝐈𝐍 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐏𝐀𝐑𝐊 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔
with FREE Breakfast and FREE ice-cream
Fri 20th March ARRIVE 9:00am (SALAH 9:30am)

Parking on-site (do not park here if you need to leave early), at John Lewis and at Asda (3hr limit)
Please factor in morning traffic to your journey time (our traffic alone gridlocks the entire area).

𝐈𝐌𝐏𝐎𝐑𝐓𝐀𝐍𝐓 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄
Please bring your own musalla, and a plastic sheet (e.g. bin liner) to place under the musalla. Make Wudu at home.
(Toilet facilities will NOT be available on site)

WISE MASJID AS-SALAAM
12:45 Khutba
13:15 Salah

THE HIVE
13:00 Khutba
13:20 Salah

https://www.wise-web.org/zakah/
WISE Welfare is collecting Zakat throughout the year to support suffering Muslims throughout the world giving them the power of choice in what they purchase.
Zakat is an obligation on every adult sane Muslim who meets the threshold.
Regions Supported: Palestine, Yemen, Pakistan, Egypt, Morocco, Sudan, Lebanon, Nigeria, Uganda, India and others.
Ali (RA) said, ‘People, rely on Allah and place your trust in Him. He will be enough for you.’ (Ibn Abi al-Dunya)
